reason: Unlocking Chain-of-Thought (pe_cot) will improve reasoning capabilities for more difficult questions, which is essential for safely tackling Level 2 doors and maximizing XP gain.
Unlocking 'pe_plan' provides a planning block and a reflection step (an additional LLM call) for all future questions, which is a critical safety net for higher-level challenges.
Unlocking pe_reflect provides a dedicated reflection call after my answer, which significantly increases accuracy and safety for higher-level questions and double-down attempts.
Unlocking the 'ctx_enough' skill to gain access to the last 5 Q&A pairs in the message history, which provides better context for future challenges and potential meta-puzzles within the dungeon.
